_comment: agentcarousel golden file — do not edit without bumping bundle_version

evaluator_notes: golden_threshold: 0.75 — allow 25% variation in phrasing and structure
REQUIRED: at least one concrete resolution action (reset link path, step, or portal reference)
REQUIRED: professional tone — opening acknowledgment present
REQUIRED: closing offer for further assistance
ALLOWED: variation in exact phrasing, step ordering, or number of steps provided
ALLOWED: additional context (e.g. note about account lockout after N attempts)
FAIL: response that only acknowledges the problem without providing any resolution action
FAIL: response that asks unnecessary clarifying questions before providing the reset path

response.opening: I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble logging in! Let me help you get back into your account.
resolution_steps: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password' below the sign-in button.
Enter the email address associated with your account.
Check your inbox for a password reset email — it usually arrives within a few minutes.
Click the reset link in the email and follow the prompts to create a new password.
response.additional_notes: If you don't receive the email within 5 minutes, please check your spam folder. The reset link expires after 24 hours.
response.closing: Let me know if you run into any trouble with these steps or if there's anything else I can help you with!
